== Notes for [[Item:Q102382|Q102382]] ==

See

"Jews in Islamic Countries in the Middle Ages"

By Moše Gîl, Volume 28 of Etudes sur le judaïsme médiéval / Etudes sur le judaïsme médiéval. Translated by David Strassler, Published by Brill 2004, ISBN 900413882X, 9789004138827 In particular we refer you to pages 78-79, footnote 64

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Bara is cited in the footnote as the real name of this daughter who was an illegitimate daughter of Sosandukht and her Jewish Court Judge.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000021827305822

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
